description_long: This object is a stylized shotgun with a metallic barrel and a wooden grip, featuring a robust, octagonal muzzle. The barrel is a shiny, reflective metal with orange accents at the muzzle and along the body, giving it a distinctive, almost ornamental appearance. The grip and stock are crafted from a wood-textured material, with visible grain patterns and a sculpted ergonomic shape. The trigger guard is angular and black, with a slightly elongated form, and the trigger itself is visible within. There is a prominent hammer mechanism on top, suggesting a break-action or single-shot design. The overall design is compact, with a short barrel and no visible magazine or pump mechanism.
description: A compact, stylized shotgun with a shiny metallic barrel, orange accents, and a sculpted wooden grip. Features a prominent hammer and angular black trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the octagonal metallic muzzle with orange trim and a glimpse of the wooden grip behind.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the shiny barrel, wooden grip, black angular trigger guard, and prominent hammer.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden grip's grain and shape, with the barrel receding away and the hammer visible on top.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the metallic barrel, wooden grip, and black trigger guard, with slightly different lighting and angle.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and octagonal with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Angular, elongated black trigger guard with a squared profile and no finger grooves
